title: CRACK? - 30lb. Combat Robot
subtitle: Completed March 2023
subheader: As the Electrical Team Lead of the Freshman Combots team at iRobotics, I worked on building and driving a 30lb overhead hammer-axe omni-drive robot, modeled after SHATTER!, a 250lb robot that competes on BattleBots.

columns.caption: The damaged robot and team after our last match at Robobrawl 2023.
Final CAD of the planned robot.

images.caption: The connection plan for the drivetrain.
The top-down wiring diagram of the robot, which would promptly be unused due to spacing issues.

content.value: We ended up finishing with an 0-2 record after a catastrophic first hit to the junior team's Budget Extinction to one of our mecanum wheels, and a burnt out UBEC (universal battery elimination circuit) crippling our drive in our second match against Jade. However, we are planning on revising this robot for the upcoming sophomore year.
